title: Remove D1 dependency from KPI worker and Grafana dashboards
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Plumbing the data pipes
gist.blurb: We've swapped out our internal data plumbing, moving our KPI dashboards to Tinybird for smoother, faster metrics.
gist.summary: Migrated internal KPI workers and Grafana dashboards from Cloudflare D1 to Tinybird to streamline our observability stack.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup reduces dependencies and improves the performance of our system monitoring tools.
gist.visual_concept: Data pipelines and dashboards. Polly the bee acting as a data plumber or analyst, interacting with glowing pipes and a retro monitor showing charts, perhaps with a tiny bird representing Tinybird.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, inspecting glowing lime green (#ecf874) data pipes alongside a small, cute pixel bird. A retro CRT monitor in the background displays colorful bar charts. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
